## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content progress, SEO performance, and strategy adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [18 new articles ready or nearly ready, with 2 more coming by Tuesday to reach 20 total](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [5 refresh articles completed, awaiting final polish](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [New articles showing promising early SEO performance (3,000 impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Shift to using Midjourney for article images, avoiding text and human faces](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Strategy in place to improve CTR on high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [10 new articles uploaded, undergoing final formatting and polish](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [8 more articles to be ready by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [5 refresh articles completed, needing final touches](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [2 additional articles to be added by Tuesday, bringing total to 20 new + 5 refreshed](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Next batch of 50 new topics to be presented for approval next week](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [New articles already generating \~3,000 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - ["Enterprise SEO" article performing well with 1,600 impressions](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [CTR currently low, but strategy in place to improve (e.g., adjusting meta titles)](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Webstacks overall getting about 30,000 impressions and 500 clicks daily](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [New content contributing \~3-4% of total impressions](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Image Strategy

  - [Shifting to using Midjourney for article images](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Guidelines: No text, no human faces](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Replicating style shown by Barstow in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### SEO Strategy Discussion

  - [Addressing potential keyword cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Options: redirecting competing articles or adjusting content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Three-pronged keyword strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
    1.  Traditional competitor gap analysis
    2.  Zero/low volume keywords
    3.  Targeting longer-tail variations of well-converting paid ad keywords

### Domain Authority

  - [Webstacks currently at \~40-41 domain rating (middle range)](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Strategy tailored to domain authority level for best results](https://fathom.video/share/xFxTsSFGxcyJKy2zzTs1rT5EAjs1VA_S?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
